title: Drishyam
tmdbOverview: When his family stares down the barrel of criminal charges, a commoner channels his street smarts and knowledge of action films to tie the long arm of the law into an investigative Gordian knot.
synopsis: Drishyam (2015) is a mystery, thriller and drama film from India. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.2 on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 14A certification (CA rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
